justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, even when the user was flexible with the exact time.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives and successfully found an appointment close to the user's preferred time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and did not ask for redundant information.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent successfully booking an appointment that met the user's needs.
